meaning: n.一种四轮马车,同型的旧式汽车
examples: That will come as the technology matures, says Mr Landau.
"The Golan will not be handed over to Syria," Landau said.
The Landau luck, Mark and Sandra were convinced, had finally shifted.
The recovery was not easy, and, at times, as we toured the paintings, Landau seemed winded.
Some critics have depicted Landau as an avaricious Svengali, a Colonel Parker, or worse.
